---
name: Change proposal
about: Propose a schema, docs, or tooling change (open an issue before a PR)
labels: enhancement
---

**Area** (spec / schema / docs / tooling)


**What & why** (the change, and the real-world driver for it)


**Target version**

Released versions are frozen; new schema work lands in the current version (e.g. `spec/v1.1/`) or a future one.
